testcase.name: logintest[standard_user, secret_sauce, hamid, test, 10000.0, true](1)
testcase.system-err: SLF4J(W): No SLF4J providers were found. SLF4J(W): Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J(W): See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details. ERROR StatusLogger Log4j2 could not find a logging implementation. Please add log4j-core to the classpath. Using SimpleLogger to log to the console... mars 30, 2026 12:22:59 AM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch AVERTISSEMENT: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 146 mars 30, 2026 12:22:59 AM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 AVERTISSEMENT: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 146.0.7680.154. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.19.1` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.
